name: Switch
description: Switch (base toggle, 32x20 track, now with a state prop for Default/Hover/Disabled QA), SwitchLabel (labeled composition mirroring CheckboxLabel/RadioLabel), SwitchCard (selectable bordered card mirroring CheckboxCard/RadioCard), and IntegrationSwitch (brand/integration row with title/badge/description, optional Manage button, Horizontal/Vertical x Card/List layouts).
sourceNote: Switch was first built from an inline raster reference inside DrawerFooter's Toggle type (no standalone Figma frame). When SwitchLabel (385:4580), SwitchCard (385:4733), and IntegrationSwitch (3678:14609) were fetched, Switch was expanded with a `state` prop (default/hover/disabled) and real hover-darkening (matching Radio/Checkbox's hover convention) since Figma showed those states explicitly. SwitchLabel/SwitchCard mirror the CheckboxLabel/CheckboxCard and RadioLabel/RadioCard architecture exactly (same generic `leading` slot simplifying Figma's 6 rigid SwitchCard types). IntegrationSwitch's brand logo is a generic `leading` slot (default: a plug icon) in place of Figma's brand-specific Microsoft Office asset.
